title: Resource
description: A finite, allocatable asset that Capabilities consume and Constraints bound: compute, storage, budget, tokens, API quota, seats, or data volume. Resource is what budgets, rate limits, and cost controls are expressed over.

kind.description: compute | storage | budget | quota | seats | tokens | data

unit.description: Unit of measure, e.g. vCPU-hours, GB, USD, requests.
